notes: Product-surface build (no registry claim IDs owned): NEW crate crates/noos-workerd (binary noos-workerd). Deterministic worker daemon: TOML config loader (deploy/workerd.toml pattern; worker.seed_hex + worker.chain_id_hex, typed errors), line-oriented job intake over stdin or --queue file (protocol documented at top of src/main.rs and in --help), dispatch to the real noos-hearth state machine (relay/seed via noos_hearth::route with is_seeding for seed; audit via noos_hearth::admit_custody then a wired noos_nel::freivalds_verify_u64 self-audit), 75-byte receipts (chain_id||job_id||class||outcome||result||seq_le) signed via noos-crypto under the registered D-SIG-WORK-RECEIPT domain, graceful shutdown on SHUTDOWN/EOF, and METRIC lines bound to frozen telemetry-v1 families (noos_nel_finality_state_jobs{state=terminal}, noos_telemetry_contract_violations_total{reason=malformed}, noos_nel_verifier_backlog{profile=freivalds_v1}); no wall clock, no OS randomness, no floats. Verified: cargo test -p noos-workerd (22 tests incl. spawn integration test asserting exact receipt bytes recomputed independently with noos-crypto, forged-body/sibling-domain/stranger-key falsifiers, malformed-line violation counting, queue-mode decreasing backlog, EOF graceful shutdown, --help protocol contract); cargo clippy -p noos-workerd --all-targets -- -D warnings clean; cargo fmt clean; telemetry spec files untouched (unit test re-reads the frozen spec and rejects any emission outside bounded enums or touching prohibited label keys). New files only: crates/noos-workerd/*, deploy/workerd.toml, this file; Cargo.lock updated for the new workspace member (zero new external dependencies beyond the already-vendored serde_json dev-dep pin).
